description: This function performs spatial statistics analysis on spatial transcriptomics data using the SThet module.
author: GenePattern Team
plan:
## spatialGE.SpatialAutocorrelation GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
spatialGE.SpatialAutocorrelation is a GenePattern module that This function performs spatial statistics analysis on spatial transcriptomics data using the SThet module.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 12 parameters:
- Required: stlist.rds.input, method, overwrite, categorical, output.filename
- Optional: genes, samples, num.neighbors, samplemeta, color.by, color.pallette, point.size

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript /spatialGE/sthet_wrapper.R --input  <stlist.rds.input> --genes  "<genes>"   <samples> --method  <method> --neighbors  <num.neighbors>  --overwrite <overwrite> --cores <job.cpuCount> <point.size> <samplemeta> <color.by> --categorical <categorical> <color.pallette> --output_filename <output.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/spatialge.spatialautocorrelation\:0.5

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: stlist.rds.input
parameters.description: An STList RDS object containing normalized data generated by spatialGE.Preprocessing.

parameters.name: genes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of gene names to compute statistics. Do not include any spaces between sample names and commas.

parameters.name: samples
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sample names or indices to compute statistics. If left blank, all samples are used. Do not include any spaces between sample names and commas.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Spatial statistic(s) to estimate\: 'moran', 'geary', or both.

parameters.name: num.neighbors
parameters.description: Number of neighbors to estimate weights.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Logical indicating if previous statistics should be overwritten.

parameters.name: samplemeta
parameters.description: A string indicating the name of the variable in the clinical data frame. If NULL, uses sample names.

parameters.name: color.by
parameters.description: The variable in x@spatial_meta used to color points in the plot. If NULL, each sample is assigned a different color.

parameters.name: categorical
parameters.description: Logical indicating whether or not to treat color_by as a categorical variable. Default is TRUE.

parameters.name: color.pallette
parameters.description: A string of a color palette from khroma or RColorBrewer, or a vector with colors with enough elements to plot categories.

parameters.name: point.size
parameters.description: A number specifying the size of the points. Passed to the size aesthetic.

parameters.name: output.filename
parameters.description: Prefix for all output filenames (rds and png).
